originalContent
option.value:
spring.application.name=auth-service server.port=8082
spring.datasource.url=jdbc:h2:file:C:/Users/sarvamangala.b/Downloads/urban-vogue-parent/data/UrbanVogueDB;AUTO_SERVER=TRUE spring.datasource.driverClassName=org.h2.Driver spring.datasource.username=sa spring.datasource.password=
spring.jpa.database-platform=org.hibernate.dialect.H2Dialect spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update spring.jpa.show-sql=true
spring.h2.console.enabled=true spring.h2.console.path=/h2-console
jwt.secret=urbanvogue-super-secret-key-for-tokengeneration-2026-very-secure-key jwt.expiration=259200000
# Notification Service URL â Send welcome/login notifications notification.service.url=http://localhost:8085

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
spring.application.name=auth-service server.port=8082
spring.datasource.url=jdbc:h2:file:C:/Users/sarvamangala.b/Downloads/urban-vogue-parent/data/UrbanVogueDB;AUTO_SERVER=TRUE spring.datasource.driverClassName=org.h2.Driver spring.datasource.username=sa spring.datasource.password=
spring.jpa.database-platform=org.hibernate.dialect.H2Dialect spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update spring.jpa.show-sql=true
spring.h2.console.enabled=true spring.h2.console.path=/h2-console
jwt.secret=urbanvogue-super-secret-key-for-tokengeneration-2026-very-secure-key jwt.expiration=259200000
# Notification Service URL → Send welcome/login notifications notification.service.url=http://localhost:8085
# User Service URL → Create user profiles during registration user.service.url=http://localhost:8087
